[30;1m1745 | [0m[35m  "node_modules/source-map-js/lib/base64-vlq.js"(exports) {[0m
[30;1m1746 | [0m[35m    "use strict";[0m
[30;1m1747 | [0m[35m    init_cjs_shims();[0m
[30;1m1748 | [0m[35m    var base64 = require_base64();[0m
[30;1m1749 | [0m[35m    var VLQ_BASE_SHIFT = 5;[0m
[30;1m1750 | [0m[35m    var VLQ_BASE = 1 << VLQ_BASE_SHIFT;[0m
[30;1m1751 | [0m[35m    var VLQ_BASE_MASK = VLQ_BASE - 1;[0m
